behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all key paths (packages/playwright/src/skill/SKILL.md, .claude/skills/playwright/, references/), strings ('Skills installed to', 'name:', 'playwright-cli', 'install-skills', 'install-browser', '--in-memory'), and capability 'network' used by tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs to change (rename, add command, recategorize) without dictating specific code lines or function implementations.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check observable behavior (help output contains string, files copied, capability value in source) which any correct implementation would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the CLI via subprocess (node MCP_CLI --help, install-skills) and verify file copying behavior, not just text inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_install_skills_copies_files requires actual command execution, file creation at .claude/skills/playwright/, SKILL.md, and references/ dir — cannot be satisfied by stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover install-skills existence, install-browser rename, file copying, route capability change, network in config, SKILL.md existence/content.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and descriptive docstrings.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands in instruction appear correct and consistent with test expectations.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction mentions files by general area (route tools, config type definitions, help text) without pointing to specific line numbers.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code task, not an agentmd-edits config task.
